questions.question: What problem occurs when using the array index as the :key in v-for?
options: Vue warns that index is not a valid key type
Rendering performance degrades due to index recalculation
On reorder, component state and DOM state get out of sync
The list fails to render items after the first update

questions.question: When iterating an object with v-for, what are the three available loop variables?
Which array operations does Vue detect automatically to trigger DOM updates?
options: filter, map, and concat since they return new arrays
Mutation methods like push, pop, splice, sort, and reverse
Any operation that changes the array's length property
All operations equally: Vue watches the entire array
